option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuButton?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.SeparatorMenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="62.0" spacing="12.0" styleClass="artist-navbar" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.NavbarArtisteController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="10.0" /> </padding>
<Button fx:id="anchorButton" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="34.0" prefWidth="34.0" styleClass="artist-icon-button" text="*" />
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" />
<Button fx:id="notificationsButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onNotificationsClick" prefHeight="34.0" prefWidth="34.0" styleClass="artist-icon-button" text="!" />
<MenuButton mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="36.0" styleClass="artist-avatar-menu" text="Admin"> <items> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSwitchToAdminView" text="Mode admin" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSwitchToArtistView" text="Mode artiste" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSwitchToAmateurView" text="Mode amateur" /> <SeparatorMenuItem /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onThemeLight" text="Theme clair" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onThemeDark" text="Theme sombre" /> <SeparatorMenuItem /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onLogoutClick" text="Se deconnecter" /> </items> </MenuButton> </HBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuButton?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.SeparatorMenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="62.0" spacing="12.0" styleClass="artist-navbar" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.NavbarArtisteController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="10.0" /> </padding>
<Button fx:id="anchorButton" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="34.0" prefWidth="34.0" styleClass="artist-icon-button" text="*" />
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8.0" styleClass="artist-brand-row"> <ImageView fitHeight="30.0" fitWidth="30.0" preserveRatio="true" styleClass="artist-brand-logo"> <image> <Image url="@/views/assets/PNG Icon.png" /> </image> </ImageView> <Label styleClass="artist-brand-text" text="Artium" /> </HBox>
<TextField prefHeight="36.0" prefWidth="260.0" promptText="Recherche..." styleClass="artist-search-field" />
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" />
<Button fx:id="notificationsButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onNotificationsClick" prefHeight="34.0" prefWidth="34.0" styleClass="artist-icon-button" text="!" />
<MenuButton mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="36.0" styleClass="artist-avatar-menu" text="Admin"> <items> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSwitchToAdminView" text="Mode admin" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSwitchToArtistView" text="Mode artiste" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSwitchToAmateurView" text="Mode amateur" /> <SeparatorMenuItem /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onThemeLight" text="Theme clair" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onThemeDark" text="Theme sombre" /> <SeparatorMenuItem /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onLogoutClick" text="Se deconnecter" /> </items> </MenuButton> </HBox>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="0.0" styleClass="profile-card" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.ProfileHeaderController"> <StackPane prefHeight="190.0" styleClass="profile-cover"> <Label styleClass="cover-title" text="ARTIUM" /> </StackPane>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="profile-body"> <padding> <Insets bottom="12.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0"> <StackPane prefHeight="88.0" prefWidth="88.0" styleClass="profile-avatar"> <ImageView fx:id="profileImageView" fitHeight="80.0" fitWidth="80.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="false" styleClass="profile-avatar-image" visible="false" /> <Label fx:id="avatarLabelFallback" styleClass="avatar-text" text="A" /> </StackPane>
<VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label fx:id="fullNameLabel" styleClass="profile-name" text="Artist Name" /> <Label fx:id="metaLabel" styleClass="profile-meta" text="Specialite - Ville - Inscrit le" /> </VBox>
<Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onEditProfileClick" styleClass="edit-profile-button" text="Edit profile" /> </HBox> </VBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="2.0" styleClass="tab-nav"> <padding> <Insets bottom="0.0" left="8.0" right="8.0" top="0.0" /> </padding>
<Button fx:id="collectionsTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onCollectionsClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Collections" /> <Button fx:id="bibliothequeTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onBibliothequeClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Bibliotheque" /> <Button fx:id="contentTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onDynamicContentClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Mes Oeuvres" /> <Button fx:id="musiquesTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onMusiquesClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Musiques" /> <Button fx:id="evenementsTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onEvenementsClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Evenements" /> <Button fx:id="reclamationsTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onReclamationsClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Reclamations" /> <Button fx:id="statistiquesTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onStatistiquesClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Statistiques" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </HBox> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="0.0" styleClass="profile-card" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.ProfileHeaderController"> <StackPane prefHeight="190.0" styleClass="profile-cover"> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="10.0" styleClass="cover-brand-row"> <ImageView fitHeight="40.0" fitWidth="40.0" preserveRatio="true" styleClass="cover-brand-logo"> <image> <Image url="@/views/images/ColoredLogo.jpg" /> </image> </ImageView> <Label styleClass="cover-title" text="Artium" /> </HBox> </StackPane>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="profile-body"> <padding> <Insets bottom="12.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0"> <StackPane prefHeight="88.0" prefWidth="88.0" styleClass="profile-avatar"> <ImageView fx:id="profileImageView" fitHeight="80.0" fitWidth="80.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="false" styleClass="profile-avatar-image" visible="false" /> <Label fx:id="avatarLabelFallback" styleClass="avatar-text" text="A" /> </StackPane>
<VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label fx:id="fullNameLabel" styleClass="profile-name" text="Artist Name" /> <Label fx:id="metaLabel" styleClass="profile-meta" text="Specialite - Ville - Inscrit le" /> </VBox>
<Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onEditProfileClick" styleClass="edit-profile-button" text="Edit profile" /> </HBox> </VBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="2.0" styleClass="tab-nav"> <padding> <Insets bottom="0.0" left="8.0" right="8.0" top="0.0" /> </padding>
<Button fx:id="collectionsTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onCollectionsClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Collections" /> <Button fx:id="bibliothequeTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onBibliothequeClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Bibliotheque" /> <Button fx:id="contentTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onDynamicContentClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Mes Oeuvres" /> <Button fx:id="musiquesTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onMusiquesClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Musiques" /> <Button fx:id="evenementsTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onEvenementsClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Evenements" /> <Button fx:id="reclamationsTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onReclamationsClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Reclamations" /> <Button fx:id="statistiquesTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onStatistiquesClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Statistiques" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </HBox> </VBox>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
